message:
test(conformance): add masked array metamorphic cases (+12)

Masked array metamorphic relations (12 cases):
- masked_fill_value_consistent: fill value preserved through operations
- masked_compress_idempotent: compress(compress(x)) = compress(x)
- masked_mask_or_idempotent: mask | mask = mask
- masked_filled_unmask_inverse: for nomask array, filled = data
- masked_reshape_preserve_mask_count: reshape preserves mask population
- masked_reduction_all_masked: sum of all-masked returns fill_value
- masked_concat_mask_count_additive: concat mask count = sum of parts
- masked_arithmetic_mask_union: a + b mask = a.mask | b.mask
- masked_copy_independence: copy does not alias original
- masked_getmaskarray_nomask: nomask array has all-false mask
- masked_transpose_mask_transpose: transpose(ma).mask = transpose(ma.mask)
- masked_hardmask_softmask_consistency: hardmask vs softmask behavior

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -15,7 +15,7 @@
 | RNG | 26 | 28 | 43 | 97 | Adequate + 39 statistical, small bound, zero-fill, single-step jump |
 | FFT | 47 | 12 | — | 59 | Good - transform families, edge sizes, 2D/3D, fftn/ifftn, shifts, fftfreq, inverse/linearity/parseval metamorphic |
 | Datetime/timedelta | 48 | 12 | — | 60 | Good - arithmetic, busday, NaT, broadcast, abs, comparisons, neg, mul-zero, add/sub inverse metamorphic |
-| Masked arrays | 44 | — | — | 44 | Good - reshape/concat/fill/broadcast/all-masked/argmin-max/axis-aware, min/max axis partial |
+| Masked arrays | 44 | 12 | — | 56 | Good - reshape/concat/fill/broadcast/all-masked/argmin-max/axis-aware, min/max axis partial, mask preservation metamorphic |
 | Iterator/transfer | 37 | 21 | 18 | 76 | Good - transfer/overlap/flatiter/broadcast, single-element, copy-overlap flags |
 | Shape/stride (SCE) | 51 | — | — | 51 | Good - 0-D, empty, negative-stride, large shapes, 5D/6D transpose, scalar-to-5D, F-order |
 | Dtype promotion | 198 | 17 | 20 | 235 | Good - full 14×14 type matrix + metamorphic + adversarial, title-case/trailing-space |
